cards.name: Star Titan
cards.abilityDescription: Killing an enemy: +2 star stacks. Each attack: +1 star stack. At 4 stacks: gain 30% max HP shield. At 6 stacks: strike all enemies for 50% damage.

cards.name: Astral Watcher
cards.abilityDescription: 25% chance to stun the enemy, skipping their next turn

cards.name: Behemoth
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: drops to 1 HP and deals 15% of MAX HP as damage to all enemies

cards.name: Celestial Ruler
cards.abilityDescription: Upon death, buffs all remaining allies' ATK by 25%

cards.name: Rift Seraph
cards.abilityDescription: Each attack has a 30% chance to simultaneously strike all enemies

cards.name: Void Reaper
cards.abilityDescription: Deals 20% more damage every attack, stacks permanently

cards.name: Void Titan
cards.abilityDescription: Enemy cards with lower rarity (more common) deal 50% less damage to this card

cards.name: Neptune
cards.abilityDescription: Slots 1-2 (High Tide): +60% ATK and 25% chance to attack again. Slots 3-4 (Low Tide): 20% DR, immune to damage while off-field. Always: reflects 25% of damage taken back at the attacker

cards.name: Shroom Spiderlings
cards.abilityDescription: Upon death, inflict 2 enemy cards with a Fungal Infection (each turn, 60% chance to be poisoned and take 10% more damage) for 3 turns.

cards.name: Shroom Paladin
cards.abilityDescription: Upon entry, grant allies a shield for 15% based off your max HP. Give yourself and allies 20% DR permanently.

cards.name: Shroom Spider
cards.abilityDescription: Every 3rd attack, summon a Shroom Spiderling at 35% of this card's stats. (Max 3 summons)

cards.name: Shroom Warrior
cards.abilityDescription: Every 2nd attack, pierce through to the next enemy for 60% damage. Each time you are attacked, gain 8% atk permanently.

cards.name: Shroom Beast
cards.abilityDescription: The first time this unit falls below 65% HP, gain 20% attack and heal for 5% max HP per allied Shroom Spider or Spiderling.

cards.name: Red Shroomage
cards.abilityDescription: Attacks apply Blightflame for 2 turns. After 2 turns, spread to all enemy cards. Blightflame: take 8% max HP per turn, and if it expires, immediately deal 20% max HP to the current enemy.

cards.name: Shroom Archer
cards.abilityDescription: While on-field, every other turn, unleash a volley of arrows dealing 20% atk to all enemies. While off-field, every 2nd ally turn, deal 40% damage to the current enemy.

cards.name: Blue Shroomage
cards.abilityDescription: Upon battle start, grant allies Serenity permanently (25% chance to not take any damage when attacked). While attacking, 20% chance to permanently disable the active enemy's ability.

cards.name: Shroom Commander
cards.abilityDescription: Upon entry, grant self and allies a 50% chance to attack a 2nd time for 50% damage. Attacks mark all enemies, causing them to take 20% more damage (max 2 stacks) from all allies.

cards.name: Green Shroomage
cards.abilityDescription: While off-field, heal allies for 10% HP each turn and grant them 2% atk permanently. 20% chance to cancel any debuffs applied to allies. When attacking, 30% chance to inflict poison for 3 turns.

cards.name: Shroom King
cards.abilityDescription: Upon death, revive with 60% HP and transform into War King form. Gain 40% attack, become immune to debuffs, and attacks pierce through to all enemies for 15% damage.

cards.name: The Wandering Shroom
cards.abilityDescription: While active, disable the opposing active enemy's ability. Each turn, choose one of four (stacking): gain 15% Lifesteal, 12% ATK, 8% max HP, or 20% DR.
